name: E-10 rule deprecation lifecycle: --update-adrs appends a Superseded: <old> -> <new> marker to ADRs that reference the old rule
command:
mkdir -p docs/adr && printf '# ADR

old-rule discussion.
' > docs/adr/0001-x.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/migrate-rule.sh" old-rule --to new-rule --update-adrs 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'Superseded: old-rule -> new-rule' docs/adr/0001-x.md && echo adr_superseded 1>&2
